name: Hmc Capital Limited
analysis: HMC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 43% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.9550, stop A$2.7522, target A$4.2436 (6.35:1) — then trail it.
